metaDescription: Stay with us! We are continuously working on expanding and improving the Portal.
title: Development Roadmap
description: Stay with us! We are continuously working on expanding and improving the Portal.

mvp.title: MVP (Minimum Viable Product)
mvp.description: Laying the foundations of the platform: Map display, registration, community and event profiles.

phase2.title: Phase 2: Connection and Communication
phase2.description: Internal messaging system, notification fine-tuning and development of the 'Ally' matching algorithm.

phase3.title: Phase 3: Resource Sharing
phase3.description: Marketplace and exchange features to facilitate sharing of tools, knowledge and other resources.

waitForUsDescription: More features coming soon. Join our newsletter or follow us on social media!
